These other procedure claim lines are defined as those with a line BETOS code (BETOS_CD) where the

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: OPROC_EVENTS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 6 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: Null/missing or 1–XXX 

COMMENT: There are 11 cost/use categories from the carrier Part B and durable medical equipment (DME) data
